plugins.description: Solution-architecture skills (architect-design, architect-diagram, architect-review). Workspace-agnostic, user-scope by default, no required configuration.
plugins.name: architect

plugins.description: Atlassian primitives: jira / jira-align / confluence-crawler (credentialed CLI), plus the flow-metrics, ai-adoption-report, and jira-defect-flow workflows that compose them.
plugins.name: atlassian

plugins.description: Contract-authoring skills: OpenAPI 3.1 (api-contract) and more to come.
plugins.name: contracts

plugins.description: File-format conversion skills: documents and images → Markdown; Markdown → styled HTML; Outlook .msg → Markdown.
plugins.name: converters

plugins.description: Core agent-ready-repo: work-loop, new-spec, bug-fix skills; reviewer/implementer agents; pre-pr + session-start hooks; conventions-check command; AGENTS.md / CHARTER / CONVENTIONS seeds.
plugins.name: core

plugins.description: User-scope credential brokering: credentials_shim (build-projected Python module for auth: creds skills), sso-broker (subprocess at ~/.agentbundle/bin/ for auth: sso-cookie skills), plus one LLM-cooperative credential-setup skill.
plugins.name: credential-brokers

plugins.description: Figma REST API primitive (credentialed CLI). Reads files / nodes / metadata / versions / comments / variables / dev resources, renders frame images, posts comments, and converts FigJam connector graphs to Mermaid.
plugins.name: figma

plugins.description: Governance skills (new-rfc, new-adr, update-conventions) and RFC/ADR templates + seed READMEs.
plugins.name: governance-extras

plugins.description: Monorepo scaffolding: new-package skill, packages/ seed README, packages/_example/ template.
plugins.name: monorepo-extras

plugins.description: Evidence-grounded research portable across every repo. Seven skills (scoping, source curation, synthesis, adversarial review, decision support, rationale reconstruction) plus two retrieval subagents; methodology grounded in seven convergent disciplines (STORM, PRISMA, ACH, Wikipedia V/RS/NPOV, OSINT, GIJN, GRADE).
plugins.name: research

plugins.description: Diátaxis-shaped user-guide skeleton: guides/ + tutorials/how-to/reference/explanation seed READMEs, new-guide skill.
plugins.name: user-guide-diataxis
